hibernate-mapping.sql-query: with src as ( select hpch.contact_date as contact_date, hpch.contact_time as contact_time, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = hpch.entity_employee_id) as entity_employee_name, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'ACTIVITY_TYPE' and lookup_code = hpch.activity_type) as activity_type, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'CONTACT_TYPE' and lookup_code = hpch.contact_type) as contact_type, copy_to_person.person_name as copy_to_person_name, copy_to_org.org_name as copy_to_org_name, hp_contact_history_api.getlongvalue(hpch.contact_id) as comments from hp_comms_person_link hcpl, hp_contact_history hpch, (select a.contact_id, listagg(b.full_name, ' - ') within group(order by a.is_primary desc, b.full_name) person_name from hp_comms_person_link a, hp_person_d b where a.contact_id in (select contact_id from hp_comms_person_link where person_id = '${personId}') and a.person_id = b.person_id group by a.contact_id ) copy_to_person, (select a.contact_id, listagg(b.organisation_name, ' - ') within group(order by a.is_primary desc, b.organisation_name) org_name from hp_comms_org_link a, hp_organisation_d b where a.contact_id in (select contact_id from hp_comms_person_link where person_id = '${personId}') and a.organisation_id = b.organisation_id group by a.contact_id ) copy_to_org where hcpl.person_id = '${personId}' and hcpl.contact_id = hpch.contact_id(+) and hcpl.contact_id = copy_to_person.contact_id(+) and hcpl.contact_id = copy_to_org.contact_id(+) union select hpch.contact_date as contact_date, hpch.contact_time as contact_time, (select full_name from hp_person_d where person_id = hpch.entity_employee_id) as entity_employee_name, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'ACTIVITY_TYPE' and lookup_code = hpch.activity_type) as activity_type, (select meaning from sys_common_lookups where lookup_type = 'CONTACT_TYPE' and lookup_code = hpch.contact_type) as contact_type, copy_to_person.person_name as copy_to_person_name, copy_to_org.org_name as copy_to_org_name, hp_contact_history_api.getlongvalue(hpch.contact_id) as comments from hp_contact_history hpch, (select a.contact_id, listagg(b.full_name, ' - ') within group(order by a.is_primary desc, b.full_name) person_name from hp_comms_person_link a, hp_person_d b where a.contact_id in (select contact_id from hp_contact_history where entity_employee_id = '${personId}') and a.person_id = b.person_id group by a.contact_id ) copy_to_person, (select a.contact_id, listagg(b.organisation_name, ' - ') within group(order by a.is_primary desc, b.organisation_name) org_name from hp_comms_org_link a, hp_organisation_d b where a.contact_id in (select contact_id from hp_contact_history where entity_employee_id = '${personId}') and a.organisation_id = b.organisation_id group by a.contact_id ) copy_to_org where hpch.entity_employee_id = '${personId}' and hpch.contact_id = copy_to_person.contact_id(+) and hpch.contact_id = copy_to_org.contact_id(+) order by contact_date desc, contact_time desc, contact_type, activity_type ) select to_char(contact_date, '${dateFormat}') || ' ' || contact_time || ' | ' || entity_employee_name || ' | ' || activity_type || ' | ' || contact_type || ' | ' || copy_to_person_name || ' | ' || copy_to_org_name as con_date, comments from src where rownum <= 50
